name: Twitch Chat
description: Twitch IRC chat reader using central main-tool platform auth/settings, with automatic token refresh, reconnect handling, metrics, emotes, viewer joins, and watch-streak alerts.
description_de: Liest und schreibt den Twitch-Chat mit zentraler Anmeldung, automatischer Token-Erneuerung, Live-Werten, Emotes, Zuschauer- und Viewer-Streak-Warnungen.
description_en: Reads and writes Twitch chat with central authentication, automatic token refresh, live metrics, emotes, viewer joins, and watch-streak alerts.
